raw_response:
I concur entirely with the assessment presented. My additional point reinforces that while hydroxyapatite plays crucial roles elsewhere in dentistry, particularly in bone augmentation and integration processes related to implants, its utility in vestibuloplasty lies outside its scope because the primary goal involves manipulating existing soft tissues rather than promoting bony healing.
